samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Control signal for selecting the operation to be performed.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">Indicates whether the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">Indicates whether a carry occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">Indicates whether the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">Indicates whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">General flag, set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU).</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="ADD">6'b100000</constant>
        <constant id="ADDU">6'b100001</constant>
        <constant id="SUB">6'b100010</constant>
        <constant id="SUBU">6'b100011</constant>
        <constant id="AND">6'b100100</constant>
        <constant id="OR">6'b100101</constant>
        <constant id="XOR">6'b100110</constant>
        <constant id="NOR">6'b100111</constant>
        <constant id="SLT">6'b101010</constant>
        <constant id="SLTU">6'b101011</constant>
        <constant id="SLL">6'b000000</constant>
        <constant id="SRL">6'b000010</constant>
        <constant id="SRA">6'b000011</constant>
        <constant id="SLLV">6'b000100</constant>
        <constant id="SRLV">6'b000110</constant>
        <constant id="SRAV">6'b000111</constant>
        <constant id="LUI">6'b001111</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="signed_a" width_description="[31:0]">Signed representation of input operand a.</assign>
        <assign id="signed_b" width_description="[31:0]">Signed representation of input operand b.</assign>
        <assign id="res" width_description="[31:0]">Register to store the result of the operation.</assign>
        <assign id="shift_amount" width_description="[4:0]">Shift amount for shift operations.</assign>
        <assign id="flag" width_description="[0:0]">Flag output for SLT and SLTU operations.</assign>
        
        <always_comb>
            <case id="operation_selection">
                <when condition="aluc == ADD">
                    res <= signed_a + signed_b;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == ADDU">
                    res <= a + b;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SUB">
                    res <= signed_a - signed_b;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SUBU">
                    res <= a - b;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == AND">
                    res <= a & b;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == OR">
                    res <= a | b;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == XOR">
                    res <= a ^ b;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == NOR">
                    res <= ~(a | b);
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLT">
                    res <= (signed_a < signed_b) ? 1 : 0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLTU">
                    res <= (a < b) ? 1 : 0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLL">
                    shift_amount <= b[4:0];
                    res <= b << shift_amount;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRL">
                    shift_amount <= b[4:0];
                    res <= b >> shift_amount;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRA">
                    shift_amount <= b[4:0];
                    res <= $signed(b) >>> shift_amount;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLLV">
                    shift_amount <= a[4:0];
                    res <= b << shift_amount;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRLV">
                    shift_amount <= a[4:0];
                    res <= b >> shift_amount;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRAV">
                    shift_amount <= a[4:0];
                    res <= $signed(b) >>> shift_amount;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == LUI">
                    res <= {a[15:0], 16'h0};
                </when>
                <default>
                    res <= 32'hzzzzzzzz;
                </default>
            </case>
        </always_comb>
        <assign id="flag_assignment">
            if (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) begin
                flag <= 1'b1;
            end else begin
                flag <= 1'bz;
            end
        </assign>
        <assign id="zero_assignment">
            if (res == 32'h00000000) begin
                zero <= 1'b1;
            end else begin
                zero <= 1'b0;
            end
        </assign>
        <assign id="carry_assignment">
            if (aluc == ADD || aluc == SUB) begin
                carry <= res[32];
            end else begin
                carry <= 1'bz;
            end
        </assign>
        <assign id="negative_assignment">
            if (res[31] == 1'b1) begin
                negative <= 1'b1;
            end else begin
                negative <= 1'b0;
            end
        </assign>
        <assign id="overflow_assignment">
            if ((aluc == ADD && (signed_a > 0 && signed_b > 0 && res[31] == 1)) ||
                (aluc == ADD && (signed_a < 0 && signed_b < 0 && res[31] == 0)) ||
                (aluc == SUB && (signed_a > 0 && signed_b < 0 && res[31] == 1)) ||
                (aluc == SUB && (signed_a < 0 && signed_b > 0 && res[31] == 0))) begin
                overflow <= 1'b1;
            end else begin
                overflow <= 1'b0;
            end
        </assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Implements arithmetic and logical operations based on the control signal (aluc).</implementation>
</module>
